name: on client.created -> seed project+task (EVENT, low-impact write)

meta.description: Fired by the event->n8n bridge at POST /webhook/ev/client.created. Seeds a default onboarding project + kickoff task via MCP, then raises an in-app notification for the ops lead. All LOW-impact writes -> run unattended (the hub gate suspends medium+/unclassified). Scoped identity wf:new-client-seed -> [projects.create, tasks.create, notify]. Env: N8N_BRIDGE_SECRET, HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, NOTIFY_USER_ID.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "projects.create", arguments: { tenantId: $json.tenantId, name: `${$json.clientName} \u2014 Onboarding`, clientId: $json.clientId } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 2, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "tasks.create", arguments: { tenantId: $json.tenantId, projectId: $json.projectId, title: "Kickoff & brief intake" } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 3, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "notify", arguments: { tenantId: $('Verify secret + extract').first().json.tenantId, recipientId: $env.NOTIFY_USER_ID, type: "client_onboarded", payload: { clientId: $('Verify secret + extract').first().json.clientId } } } }) }}
